messages.content: Always use code blocks with the appropriate language tags. If asked for a table always format it using Markdown syntax.
what is jira app used for

Jira is a popular project management software used by development teams to track issues and manage tasks. It provides the tools for planning, tracking, and releasing software, as well as managing workflows and collaborating with team members. Jira can be used for various purposes, including bug tracking, task management, project management, and agile software development. It allows teams to organize and prioritize work, assign tasks, track progress, and communicate effectively.
